subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: If all the world should combine to overthrow the Covenant, it could not succeed. ‘Abdu'l-Bahá loves all no matter how they turn away from Him.
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity
